sentences.jp: 今朝、私は公園を歩きます。
sentences.en: This morning, I walk through the park.
The trees and flowers are quiet.
The dog, too, walks down the road.

sentences.jp: そして、私は家のドアに帰ります。
sentences.en: And then, I head back to the door of the house.

sentences.jp: 外は雨です。風も来ます。
sentences.en: Outside, it is raining. Wind also comes.

sentences.jp: 風と雨の朝、いい散歩です。
sentences.en: A morning of wind and rain — a good walk.
